products.name: ZOMA BAFIX FOAM
products.purpose: cleaning agent designet to remove scale from bathroom surfaces
products.description: Zoma Bafix Foam is a ready-to-use, foaming cleaning agent designed to remove scale from bathroom surfaces. It effectively eliminates limescale and other types of dirt. Suitable for use on undamaged porcelain, ceramic, and enamel sanitary surfaces.
doNotUse: Do not mix Zoma Bafix Foam with chlorine-containing products.
Do not use on acid-sensitive surfaces such as marble and others.

products.name: ZOMA GLASS CLEANER
products.purpose: streak-free glass and mirror cleaning solution
products.description: Zoma Glass Cleaner provides a streak-free shine on all glass surfaces, mirrors, and windows. Its advanced formula quickly removes fingerprints, smudges, and dirt without leaving residue.
instructionsForUse: Spray directly onto the glass surface
Wipe with a clean, dry cloth
Polish with circular motions for best results
doNotUse: Do not use on hot surfaces.
Avoid contact with wooden frames and painted surfaces.
products.store: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

products.name: ZOMA FLOOR CLEANER PRO
products.description: Zoma Floor Cleaner Pro is a powerful concentrate designed for all types of hard floors including tile, laminate, vinyl, and sealed wood. Leaves a fresh scent and protective coating.
instructionsForUse: Mop the floor with the solution
doNotUse: Do not use on unsealed wood or natural stone without testing first.
Do not use undiluted on sensitive surfaces.
products.store: Keep in original container. Store at room temperature.

products.name: ZOMA DISH SOAP ULTRA
products.purpose: concentrated dishwashing liquid with grease-cutting power
products.description: Zoma Dish Soap Ultra cuts through tough grease and dried-on food with ease. Gentle on hands with added moisturizers. Creates rich, long-lasting suds for effective cleaning.
instructionsForUse: Apply small amount to sponge or directly to dishes
For tough grease, let soak for 5 minutes
doNotUse: Not for use in automatic dishwashers.
Avoid contact with eyes.
products.store: Store at room temperature. Keep out of reach of children.

products.name: ZOMA KITCHEN DEGREASER
products.description: Zoma Kitchen Degreaser is specifically formulated to tackle burnt-on grease, oil splatters, and tough kitchen grime on stoves, ovens, range hoods, and countertops.
doNotUse: Do not use on aluminum or copper surfaces.
Not suitable for painted or varnished surfaces.
products.store: Store upright in cool, dry place.

products.name: ZOMA TOILET BOWL CLEANER
products.purpose: powerful toilet cleaning gel with disinfectant
products.description: Zoma Toilet Bowl Cleaner is a thick gel formula that clings to the bowl surface, removing stains, limescale, and bacteria. Leaves toilets sparkling clean with a fresh scent.
instructionsForUse: Apply gel under the rim and around the bowl
doNotUse: Do not mix with other cleaning products, especially bleach.
Do not use on colored grout or natural stone.
products.store: Store in original bottle. Keep away from children and pets.

products.name: ZOMA BATHROOM TILE CLEANER
products.purpose: removes soap scum and water stains from tiles
products.description: Zoma Bathroom Tile Cleaner effectively removes soap scum, hard water deposits, and mildew stains from bathroom tiles and grout. Safe for daily use.
doNotUse: Avoid use on natural stone tiles without testing.
Do not use with bleach-based products.

products.name: ZOMA PAPER TOWELS PREMIUM
products.purpose: absorbent 3-ply paper towels for kitchen and cleaning
products.description: Zoma Premium Paper Towels are extra absorbent and strong, even when wet. Perfect for spills, cleaning surfaces, and drying dishes. Each roll contains 120 sheets.
instructionsForUse: Tear off desired number of sheets
Use for wiping, cleaning, or drying
doNotUse: Do not flush down toilet.
Not suitable for use as facial tissue.
products.store: Keep in dry place away from moisture.

products.name: ZOMA TOILET PAPER SOFT
products.description: Zoma Soft Toilet Paper combines softness with strength. Made from premium quality fibers, it's gentle on skin while being durable. Septic safe and biodegradable.
doNotUse: Do not use for other cleaning purposes.
products.store: Store in dry area. Protect from moisture.

products.name: ZOMA MICROFIBER CLOTHS SET
products.purpose: reusable microfiber cleaning cloths for all surfaces
products.description: Zoma Microfiber Cloths are ultra-absorbent and lint-free, perfect for cleaning glass, surfaces, electronics, and vehicles. Machine washable and reusable up to 500 times.
instructionsForUse: Air dry or tumble dry on low
doNotUse: Do not use fabric softener when washing.
Do not bleach or iron.
products.store: Store in clean, dry place when not in use.

products.name: ZOMA COTTON CLEANING RAGS
products.purpose: durable cotton rags for heavy-duty cleaning
products.description: Zoma Cotton Cleaning Rags are made from 100% recycled cotton. Highly absorbent and durable, ideal for workshops, garages, and industrial cleaning tasks.
instructionsForUse: Use for wiping, cleaning, or polishing
doNotUse: Not recommended for glass surfaces (may leave lint).
Avoid using with flammable liquids near open flames.
products.store: Keep in ventilated area. Wash before first use.

products.name: ZOMA ALL-PURPOSE CLEANER
products.purpose: versatile spray cleaner for multiple surfaces
products.description: Zoma All-Purpose Cleaner is suitable for countertops, appliances, walls, and most washable surfaces. Cuts through grease and grime while leaving a pleasant fresh scent.
instructionsForUse: For tough stains, let sit for 1-2 minutes
doNotUse: Do not use on wood or leather.
Test on inconspicuous area first for delicate surfaces.
products.store: Store at room temperature away from heat sources.

products.name: ZOMA DISINFECTANT SPRAY
products.purpose: antibacterial spray that kills 99.9% of germs
products.description: Zoma Disinfectant Spray eliminates 99.9% of bacteria and viruses on hard surfaces. Ideal for kitchens, bathrooms, door handles, and high-touch areas.
instructionsForUse: Allow to air dry for maximum effectiveness
doNotUse: Do not use on food contact surfaces without rinsing.
Not for use on skin or fabrics.
products.store: Store in cool place. Keep container closed when not in use.

products.name: ZOMA OVEN CLEANER
products.purpose: heavy-duty cleaner for ovens and grills
products.description: Zoma Oven Cleaner cuts through baked-on grease and carbon deposits in ovens, grills, and BBQ equipment. Works on cold or warm surfaces.
instructionsForUse: Close oven and leave for 30 minutes
doNotUse: Do not use on self-cleaning oven interiors.
Keep away from heating elements.
Do not use on aluminum.
products.store: Store upright. Keep away from heat and flames.

products.name: ZOMA FURNITURE POLISH
products.description: Zoma Furniture Polish cleans, shines, and protects wood furniture. Contains natural oils that nourish wood and create a protective barrier against dust and fingerprints.
instructionsForUse: Apply to furniture in circular motions
Buff to a shine with clean cloth
doNotUse: Do not spray directly onto furniture.
Not suitable for unfinished or waxed wood.
products.store: Store in upright position at room temperature.

products.name: ZOMA NAPKINS PREMIUM
products.description: Zoma Premium Napkins are soft, absorbent, and elegant. Perfect for everyday meals, parties, and special occasions. Available in white color.
instructionsForUse: Keep in dry place before use
doNotUse: Single use only - do not wash and reuse.
products.store: Store in original packaging. Protect from moisture.

products.name: ZOMA STAINLESS STEEL CLEANER
products.purpose: polish and protect stainless steel appliances
products.description: Zoma Stainless Steel Cleaner removes fingerprints, water spots, and smudges from refrigerators, dishwashers, sinks, and other stainless steel surfaces. Leaves a protective, streak-free shine.
instructionsForUse: Wipe in direction of grain with soft cloth
Buff to shine with dry cloth
doNotUse: Do not use on hot surfaces.
Not suitable for chrome or painted surfaces.
products.store: Keep in original container. Store at room temperature.

products.name: ZOMA DRAIN UNBLOCKER
products.purpose: powerful gel to clear blocked drains
products.description: Zoma Drain Unblocker is a thick gel formula that clings to pipes, dissolving hair, soap, grease, and other blockages. Safe for all pipes including PVC and metal.
instructionsForUse: Leave for 15-30 minutes (or overnight for tough clogs)
doNotUse: Do not use if drain is completely blocked.
Do not mix with other drain cleaners or chemicals.
Not suitable for use with plunger simultaneously.
products.store: Store upright in cool place. Keep tightly closed.
